title: lepidaploa costanensis
intro: Lepidaploa costanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Costanense dandelion. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidaploa costanensis include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment.
